headline: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Backend-leaning full-stack engineer with 6 years building reliable, scalable web services. I care about clean APIs, good tests, and shipping.

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a monolith to Node.js microservices, cutting p95 latency by 40%.
Designed a GraphQL gateway used by 12 internal teams.
Mentored 4 engineers and introduced trunk-based CI/CD with GitHub Actions.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built a React + TypeScript storefront serving 2M monthly users.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries, reducing checkout time by 25%.
Added end-to-end tests, raising coverage from 30% to 80%.
